title: Claude Code v2.1.142 — Opus 4.7 fast mode, plugin skills, claude agents flags, MCP timeout fixes
summary: v2.1.142 (2026-05-14): New claude agents flags, Opus 4.7 fast mode support, plugin skills, MCP timeout fixes, background session fixes. v2.1.141 (2026-05-13): Terminal sequences for hooks, HTTPS plugin cloning, workspace ID support, 50+ bug fixes. v2.1.140 (2026-05-12): Agent sub-agent type matching improvements.

title: Anthropic forms $200 million partnership with the Gates Foundation
summary: Anthropic and Gates Foundation partner on $200M 4-year initiative covering global health (vaccines, HPV, polio), education (K-12 tutoring, sub-Saharan Africa literacy), and economic mobility (smallholder farming AI). Central to Anthropic's mission to extend AI benefits beyond market incentives.

title: PwC deploys Claude enterprise-wide for client technology and deal execution
summary: PwC is deploying Claude to build technology, execute deals, and reinvent enterprise functions for clients. Announced May 14, 2026. Represents major enterprise consulting-sector adoption.

title: Cline releases open-source @cline/sdk agent runtime — rebuilds entire harness, beats Claude Code on tbench claim
summary: Cline open-sourced @cline/sdk: layered TypeScript agent runtime with @cline/shared, @cline/llms (Anthropic/OpenAI/Google/Bedrock), @cline/agents (stateless loop), @cline/core (stateful orchestration). Native agent teams, CRON jobs, MCP connectors. X post claims SDK beats Claude Code on tbench benchmark.

title: Codex CLI rust-v0.131.0-alpha.19 and alpha.21 — persisted /goal workflows, Vim mode, plugin management
summary: Two Codex CLI alpha releases on May 15, 2026: alpha.19 (05:12 UTC) and alpha.21 (18:48 UTC). Features: persisted /goal workflows, Vim mode for terminal editing, redesigned resume/fork picker, expanded plugin management with remote sync, /hooks browser. Also: Codex available in ChatGPT mobile app preview.

title: AWS MCP Server is now generally available — IAM-based guardrails, CloudTrail logging
summary: AWS announced GA of the AWS MCP Server on May 6. Managed server giving AI coding agents secure, auditable AWS API access via MCP. Features: call any AWS API through single tool, sandboxed Python execution against AWS services, IAM guardrails, CloudWatch metrics, CloudTrail logging. No additional charge.

title: Anthropic still holding out on Claude Mythos — OpenAI shares EU cyber model while Mythos stays in preview
summary: OpenAI giving EU access to new cyber model but Anthropic still holding out on Mythos (its advanced cybersecurity/red-team model previewed at red.anthropic.com). Mythos remains research preview only as regulatory negotiations continue.

title: Cursor, Claude Code, and Codex forming composable AI coding stack — not merging but layering
summary: Analysis: Rather than a single tool winning, Cursor+Claude Code+Codex are forming a composable stack with orchestration, execution, and review layers. Developers use 2.3 AI coding tools on average. DeepSeek TUI emerging as fourth competitive option with 1M-token context.

title: Ask HN: Is it just me or is Claude Code getting worse?
summary: Active HN thread with community reporting quality regressions and usage limit reductions since Claude 4.6 release. Mixed responses: some users see regressions, Anthropic posted update. Anthropic acknowledged quality reports and shared investigations.
